message:
feat(runtime,server): maxmemory-samples, SHUTDOWN graceful exit

- maxmemory-samples: fix default from 16 to 5 (match Redis), wire
  CONFIG SET/GET to runtime eviction sample limit
- SHUTDOWN: set shutdown_requested flag on ServerState, server event
  loop checks flag each tick and exits gracefully with optional
  final SAVE (NOSAVE skips it, ABORT cancels pending shutdown)

Closes: frankenredis-bfp, frankenredis-mmg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
